ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "cage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cage where the animal is housed */,
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enclosure where the animal is housed */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal in kilograms */,
  "weight_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight was last recorded */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the animal (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "feed_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the animal is fed */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food the animal consumes */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the animal */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the animal */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date the animal arrived at the zoo */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the animal */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal in years */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Any dietary restrictions for the animal */,
  "allergy_notes" TEXT /* Any allergy notes for the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_enclosure_id FOREIGN KEY ("enclosure_id") REFERENCES enclosures ("enclosure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_cage_id FOREIGN KEY ("cage_id") REFERENCES cages ("cage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cages" (
  "cage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cage */,
  "cage_number" INTEGER /* Number of the cage */,
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enclosure where the cage is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of animals the cage can house */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cage */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in the cage */,
  "humidity_level" TEXT /* Humidity level in the cage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cages_enclosure_id FOREIGN KEY ("enclosure_id") REFERENCES enclosures ("enclosure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enclosures" (
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enclosure */,
  "enclosure_number" INTEGER /* Number of the enclosure */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of animals the enclosure can house */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enclosure */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the enclosure in square meters */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the enclosure (e.g., tropical, desert, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enclosure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeding_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feeding schedule */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being fed */,
  "feed_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the animal is fed */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food the animal consumes */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of food in kilograms */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for feeding */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of feeding (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeding_schedules_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the health check-up */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the animal */,
  "vaccinations" TEXT /* Vaccinations administered */,
  "treatments" TEXT /* Treatments given */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who performed the check-up */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the animal's condition */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed for the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrichment_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrichment activity */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of enrichment activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrichment_activities_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the veterinarian */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the veterinarian */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the veterinarian */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Keeper, Vet, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Job description of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., Adult, Child, Senior) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the visitor (e.g., Child, Adult, Senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit log */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "enclosure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enclosure visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time the visitor entered the enclosure */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time the visitor exited the enclosure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_logs_enclosure_id FOREIGN KEY ("enclosure_id") REFERENCES enclosures ("enclosure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_logs_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, lecture, workshop) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the event (e.g., children, adults, families) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Registered, Attended) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the participant (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who administered the treatment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_treatments_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_treatments_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who administered the vaccination */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_vaccinations_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("veterinarian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_vaccinations_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
